changelog: Fix: UrBackup API login — no-password mode now uses correct GET login (was sending wrong POST causing auth failures every 15min)
Fix: Update progress modal shows 'Service Restarting...' while backend is down during update
Fix: About page Update Now / Force Reinstall use inline confirm instead of browser-blocked window.confirm
Fix: Update notification shows error if update POST fails instead of silently navigating to empty modal
